_template_description: Four-act structure for high-energy edits. Intro → buildup → drop → bigger drop. Works with most modern cinematic/trailer music.

concept.one_sentence: Four acts of escalating energy — setup, buildup, drop, climax.

acts.name: setup
acts.notes: Establish the world. One hero per fandom. Wide shots.

acts.name: buildup
acts.notes: Stakes climb. Faster cuts. Tension-building shots.

acts.name: drop
acts.notes: The main drop. Hero shots on every downbeat. Biggest moments.

acts.name: climax
acts.notes: Bigger drop. Unifying moment across fandoms. Biggest visual payoff.
